/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -g -O2 -ffile-prefix-map=/local/intranet.tuxist.de/jan.koester/debian/CPP-SMTPClient-library=. -fstack-protector-strong -fstack-clash-protection -Wformat -Werror=format-security -fcf-protection -Wdate-time -D_FORTIFY_SOURCE=2 -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/smtpclient.dir/link.d -Wl,-z,relro -shared -Wl,-soname,libsmtpclient.so.1 -o libsmtpclient.so.1.1.13 CMakeFiles/smtpclient.dir/src/attachment.cpp.o CMakeFiles/smtpclient.dir/src/base64.cpp.o CMakeFiles/smtpclient.dir/src/credential.cpp.o CMakeFiles/smtpclient.dir/src/htmlmessage.cpp.o CMakeFiles/smtpclient.dir/src/message.cpp.o CMakeFiles/smtpclient.dir/src/messageaddress.cpp.o CMakeFiles/smtpclient.dir/src/messageidutils.cpp.o CMakeFiles/smtpclient.dir/src/plaintextmessage.cpp.o CMakeFiles/smtpclient.dir/src/smtpclientbase.cpp.o CMakeFiles/smtpclient.dir/src/smtpclient.cpp.o CMakeFiles/smtpclient.dir/src/securesmtpclientbase.cpp.o CMakeFiles/smtpclient.dir/src/opportunisticsecuresmtpclient.cpp.o CMakeFiles/smtpclient.dir/src/forcedsecuresmtpclient.cpp.o CMakeFiles/smtpclient.dir/src/serveroptionsanalyzer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/smtpclient.dir/src/stringutils.cpp.o CMakeFiles/smtpclient.dir/src/errorresolver.cpp.o CMakeFiles/smtpclient.dir/src/cpp/attachment.cpp.o CMakeFiles/smtpclient.dir/src/cpp/credential.cpp.o CMakeFiles/smtpclient.dir/src/cpp/forcedsecuresmtpclient.cpp.o CMakeFiles/smtpclient.dir/src/cpp/htmlmessage.cpp.o CMakeFiles/smtpclient.dir/src/cpp/plaintextmessage.cpp.o CMakeFiles/smtpclient.dir/src/cpp/message.cpp.o CMakeFiles/smtpclient.dir/src/cpp/messageaddress.cpp.o CMakeFiles/smtpclient.dir/src/cpp/opportunisticsecuresmtpclient.cpp.o CMakeFiles/smtpclient.dir/src/cpp/smtpclient.cpp.o  -lssl -lcrypto
